mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_scope (notice_id, scope_type, scope_id, created_at) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, notice_id, scope_type, scope_id, created_at FROM notice_scope WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}

SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT('u', u.id) as userKey FROM notice_scope ns LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON (ns.scope_type = 'USER' AND ns.scope_id = u.id) OR (ns.scope_type = 'DEPT' AND ns.scope_id = u.dept_id) OR (ns.scope_type = 'ALL' AND u.status = 1) WHERE ns.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND u.status = 1
